steps.title: Locate the clause boundary
steps.content: The sentence needs to complete "Such interpretations are ultimately speculative" and then introduce a concessive idea: the gray color may be incidental rather than meaningful. The punctuation has to separate the completed first clause from the following clause.

steps.title: Place the transition cleanly
steps.content: A leaves the relationship underpunctuated, B adds an unnecessary comma after the transition, and C puts the semicolon before the transition instead of after it. The remaining option uses the concessive transition with the needed clause break. The answer is D.
